sentences.arabic: الْعِطْرُ وَالْبُخُورُ جُزْءٌ مُهِمٌّ مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Miris i tamjan važan su dio arapske kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Perfume and incense are an important part of Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الْعَرَبُ الرَّوَائِحَ الطَّيِّبَةَ وَيَسْتَخْدِمُونَ الْعِطْرَ فِي كُلِّ مُنَاسَبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapi vole lijepe mirise i koriste parfem u svakoj prigodi.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs love pleasant fragrances and use perfume on every occasion.

sentences.arabic: يُشْعَلُ الْبُخُورُ فِي الْبُيُوتِ لِتَعْطِيرِ الْهَوَاءِ وَتَرْحِيبِ الضُّيُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Tamjan se pali u domovima kako bi se zrak mirisao i ugostili gosti.
sentences.translationEn: Incense is burned in homes to scent the air and welcome guests.

sentences.arabic: مِنْ أَشْهَرِ أَنْوَاعِ الْبُخُورِ الْعُودُ الرَّائِحَةُ الثَّمِينَةُ الَّتِي تَأْتِي مِنَ الْخَشَبِ الْعَطِرِ.
sentences.translation: Jedna od najpoznatijih vrsta tamjana je oud, dragocjeni miris koji dolazi od mirisnog drveta.
sentences.translationEn: One of the most famous types of incense is oud, a precious fragrance that comes from aromatic wood.
